title: saxifraga rotundifolia subsp. rotundifolia
intro: Saxifraga rotundifolia subsp. rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family, native to the Arctic regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Saxifraga rotundifolia subsp. rotundifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
